metadata.name: Offer Seat Upgrade to Loyalty Member

description: A long-time season ticket holder and high-ranking loyalty member is offered a complimentary seat upgrade for a game.

nodes.task_description: Identify top-tier loyalty members attending the next game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of eligible fans.

nodes.task_description: Check for unsold premium seats for that game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds two available seats in a premium section.

nodes.task_description: Send a notification to an eligible fan offering them the complimentary upgrade.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the offer via the team's mobile app.

nodes.task_description: If the fan accepts, automatically reissue their tickets with the new seat location.

expected_outcome.value: The fan accepts, and the agent's tool automatically updates their tickets.
